feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Service Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Service Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Lead Management: Create Lead only with contact and without "Existing Account" or "Company"
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We have a requirement to create Leads without an existing Account/Company, but it seems this is not possible.

While it's possible to create Opportunities using just a Contact, the Account is mandatory for Leads and cannot be unchecked in FineTuning / Leads / Involved Parties.

Additionally, there is no option in Scoping to create Leads without an existing Account/Company, unlike with Opportunities.

What can we do to address this requirement?

entry.title: SAP Sales Service Cloud Version 2 API - Why no OData support?
entry.content:
Hello together,

someone knows the reason why v2 support only REST and not OData? SAP Cloud for customer (v1) uses OData Services. CAP is using OData and other SAP backend APIs are also OData Services. So I am just curious why REST was chosen or if OData will be supported later.

E.g.

v2 https://api.sap.com/api/SalesSvcCloudV2_taskService/overview 

v1 https://api.sap.com/api/activity/overview 

Thanks and best regards,

Julian

entry.title: How to add survey link to email template in SAP Sales/Service Cloud Version 2.0
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

My query is on Feedback flow feature in SAP Service Cloud V2.

In C4C V1, we have a possibility to link the placeholder to any unique id.

Example: #SURVEY145# linked to Ticket ID.

Similarly in V2, how to add a survey link to email template, so that when a feedback flow is triggers an email to customer where the customer can clicks on survey link and fill the survey.

Thanks,
Manson J

entry.title: As a partner, how do we know when to offer v2 over v1?
entry.content:
Hi experts

As an SAP partner, our team is doing some work in understanding how or when to position C4C v2 over v1 to new clients, or when to offer v2 to existing v1 clients. Can you point me to some documents or links which can help us out?

Thanks

entry.title: Resolving Mapping Issues Between SAP Customer Data Platform and SAP Service Cloud V1
entry.content:
Hello together,

We are currently working on an integration between the SAP Customer Data Platform (CDP) and a SAP Service Cloud V1 tenant. On the CDP side, we are using the Customer Schema "SAP Integrated," which includes arrays for address data. Specifically, we have three array

  • addresses (for postal address information)
  • phones
  • mails

However, on the Service Cloud side, we are utilizing the standard data model of the individual customer object. Here, the underlying navigation property for address entries consolidates all information into a single entry, encompassing address, phone, and mail data.

When attempting bi-directional mapping between these systems, we encounter a significant challenge. We need to map the arrays from the CDP to a single entry in the Service Cloud (C4C) environment. Conversely, one address entry in the C4C environment results in three separate entries in each array within the CDP. This leads to a problem where updating any customer information could generate multiple entries in the C4C, which originally had only one entry.

Example

  • CDP to C4C: The three separate arrays (addresses, phones, mails) in the CDP need to be merged into one entry in C4C.
  • C4C to CDP: A single entry in C4C generates three entries in the CDP arrays. If we update these, the customer record in C4C could mistakenly get multiple entries.

We would like to stay as close to the standard configuration as possible, avoiding custom development if possible.

Does anyone have experience with this kind of integration or suggestions on how to effectively map these data structures while staying close to standard configurations?

Best regards,

entry.title: BOs get locked by custom Action in OWL
entry.content:
We have the requirement to have a button that get a sum of the total net amount for selected customerQuotes / salesOrders in the OWL.

We implemented a custom absl BO Action in mass mode that calculates the sum and displays it in an information message. This is working prefectly fine.

The problem is, that the BOs we selected for which the action is called are getting locked in this process. As long as the user stays on the OWL the orders remain locked by the system. Because this is a mass operation we cannot accept that the orders get locked, so others cannot change them. We just need a simple "read only" action. But I cannot find any solution for this. I had the idea to use an Action Validation, but this is not available for my custom Action.

Does anybody have an idea?

entry.title: Can we update activity from Service request?
entry.content:
We have created an OVS field as Email assigned to and we want to update this field when there is an email going from Ticket and create an Activity. We want to update this field with the same employee who is assigned to the ticket.. Long story short we want to copy the ticket assigned to the email assigned to field on every inbound and outbound email interaction happens in the ticket.

 

I am using internal communication in the ticket but it seems it is not updating the acivity.

Please help..

Regards,

CXM

entry.title: Integration between sap service cloud version 2 with sap customer data cloud
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

Does anybody know about integration between SAP service cloud version 2 with SAP customer data cloud?

entry.title: C4C Service Process- Multiple Registered Product
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We have a request from a customer who wants to include multiple registered products in a single ticket. Currently, when attempting to add multiple registered products manually, I can filter them by customer and ship-to address. However, is there a way to view all registered products at once and add as many as needed?

entry.title: How to generate Client SSL Certification in SAP Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

While configuring communication system in SAP Service Cloud v2, under Outbound section, we have option to select Authentication Method as Client SSL Certificate.

Can someone let me know if this Client SSL Certificate needs to be generated in Service Cloud v2 or is generated by CPI Team or other team and shared with with Service Cloud v2 Team.

 

If SSL Certificate needs to be generated in Service Cloud v2, kindly help me with the steps to generate it.

 

Thank you in advance.

 

Regards,

Syed Muheed

entry.title: How to test a Nodejs application using approuter from postman ?
entry.content:
Hello Experts',

We are trying to implement a scenario using webhooks from SAP Service Cloud V2 to SAP BTP. I have already created an application using nodejs and axios api to trigger an event or action in sap v2 once event is received in BTP.

This works fine. No issue in the connection.

(please note: BTP application here refers to just handling of logic. I don't need to created any UI to have interaction for the nodejs btp application. It is just to handle some complex logic.)

But problem is the BTP application is being called from V2 without any authentication. I am able to call the same from postman as well it works fine.

Now I have implemented approuter using xsuaa service. The approuter is created and now when I try to access the webhook using approuter it is not working.

Checking through all the blogs, I am unable to identify the correct method of Authentication.

Question and doubts I have:

How can I authenticate the application (as it is not required to have any roles or scopes)

Do i still need to define the scopes and roles in xs-app.json?

Why scopes and roles are needed. I want to authenticate it using just some authentication method. Roles and scopes should be important only when user interaction is involved.

Is there a way, I can setup a simple authentication using a BTP user ?

I am attaching screenshots of important files.

SAP Service Cloud , SAP Sales Cloud , 

@Kinsbrunner

entry.title: 2408 release- C4C screen to open when triggered from a Mashup in any other NGAP screen
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

In the 2408 release, a new feature has been introduced that allows the C4C screen to open when triggered from a Mashup in any other NGAP screen. Has anyone had experience with implementing this?

Thanks

Shuva

entry.title: I am trying to set a workflow rule to send email when the "Assigned To" field on ticket is blank.
entry.content: I am trying to set a workflow rule to send email when the "Assigned To" field on ticket is blank. In other words how does the query Unassigned tickets work. I tried to set condition with "Not Assigned", "Is Initial", "#" etc but none work.

entry.title: Role Layout in SAP Sales Service Cloud V2 is supported?
entry.content:
Hi Cx community,

Is it possible to customize Roles Layout in SAP Sales Service Cloud v2?. I'm refering to funtions in next screen in V1:

I have looked for this feature in documentation, however haven´t find it for v2.

Thanks in advanced,

Niko

entry.title: Is there a feed feature in SAP Sales Service Cloud v2?
entry.content:
Hi Cx Community,

One of most loved and practice feature in SAP Sales Service cloud "v1" is the ability to have, an open or a private, communication between users in any master data or process by using Feed funcionlity. Is there a similar one in SAP Sales Service Cloud v2? Next some screens from "v1"

entry.title: Is it possible to maintain more than 4 characters while configuring Code List in SAP Service Cloudv2
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When we try to enter more than 4 characters while configuring code list in SAP Service Cloud v2, we are receiving below error message.

"Code cannot exceed more than 4 characters"

Is it possible to increase the character limit in code?

If possible, what is the setting that we need to do.

 

Regards,

Syed Muheed

entry.title: What is the file storage limit per user for Sales and Service Cloud V2? If the limit is exceeded, ho
entry.content: What is the file storage limit per user or tenant for Sales and Service Cloud V2? If the limit is exceeded, how should the files be backed up?

entry.title: How to update a boolean field type using determination in Service Cloud version 2?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have created a custom field of the type boolean for our requirement. Now the requirement is the boolean field type should automatically get updated when certain condition is fulfilled. I am using Determinations in Extensibility in Service Cloud V2 for the update. However I am not able to get proper syntax for the field assignment in order to update the value automatically?

I am attaching a screenshot of my Assignment.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Service Cloud: Possible to convert a characteristic into a key figure in order to calculate?
entry.content:
Hello all, 

I want to convert a characteristic into a key figure in order to calculate with it. Is this possible or not?

My business scenario is: I want to check wheater the SLA of a ticket is fulfilled or not. Therefore I want to subtract the fields 'Initial Review due' with 'Initial Review completed'. If it is a positive value, it was fulfilled. If it is a negative value, it was not fulfilled (show it in red, if possible).

I currently dont see an option to convert the characteristic into key figure in order to calculate. 

But hopefully, I am wrong... 
Can anybody help?

Best reagds,
Deborah

#C4C #servicecloud #report # reporting #calculate #characteristic #keyfigure

entry.title: Email Received date in Ticket Report
entry.content:
For scenarios, where ticket is getting created automatically from Incoming emails via various channels, there is a requirement to calculate SLA how long it took to create the ticket for Unassociated Emails by the agents. 

For this purpose, we need

Email Received Date in ticket to do the comparison with first response date.

Time between the email received and first response date need to be calculated.

Currently Ticket Interactions Report has activity reported on field exposed. and the 'Reported On' Date in the report displays incorrect data for some of the tickets.

Request to provide any insights if anyone has worked on similar scenario.

Regards, Abdul Rasheed
